metadata.description: The claude-bootstrap ecosystem: a self-growing Claude Code setup engine, plus nodo for codebase mapping. They bind together — bootstrap consumes nodo's architecture map and can install it on demand.

plugins.name: claude-bootstrap
plugins.description: Self-healing, self-learning Claude Code setup that augments itself in real time — discovers, installs, or forges the skills and MCP servers your project needs.

plugins.name: nodo
plugins.description: Map any codebase: deterministic dependency + symbol + call graph, issue detection, and AI-agent context. The architecture layer of the ecosystem — claude-bootstrap reads its map at session start.
